description: Atlas automation manifest. Central config for all scheduled tasks.

tasks.name: Morning Briefing
tasks.description: Automated daily briefing via Copilot CLI

tasks.name: End of Day Auto
tasks.description: Automated EOD agent at 8 PM if not already run today. Skips if work journal exists.

tasks.name: Weekly Review Reminder
tasks.description: Notification to run weekly review interactively

tasks.name: Rolling Meeting Brief Sweep
tasks.description: Every 15 min during work hours: pre-brief upcoming high-stakes meetings (next 60 min) that haven't been briefed yet. Per-event ledger at assistant/state/meeting-briefs.json.
tasks.enable_instructions: 1) Confirm /meeting-brief prompt resolves an event end-to-end interactively (run `/meeting-brief next` once). 2) Create a launchd plist at ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.atlas.meeting-sweep.plist with StartInterval=900 and KeepAlive=false. 3) launchctl load -w ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.atlas.meeting-sweep.plist. 4) Set `enabled: true` here.

tasks.name: Auto Draft Inbox
tasks.description: Every 30 min during work hours: scan work inbox for new messages where Derek can reply, score with /draft-message confidence rubric, save Tier-A drafts (>=0.80) to Outlook on the original thread. Never sends. Log: assistant/state/auto-drafts.log.
tasks.enable_instructions: 1) Run `/draft-inbox --since 2h --dry-run` interactively first to confirm scoring and draft-save behavior look right. 2) Run live once: `/draft-inbox --since 2h` and verify drafts appear in Outlook on the correct threads. 3) Create launchd plist ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.atlas.auto-draft-inbox.plist with StartInterval=1800 and KeepAlive=false. 4) launchctl load -w ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.atlas.auto-draft-inbox.plist. 5) Set `enabled: true` here. Always conservative: threshold 0.80, never auto-sends.

wake_schedule.note: Run once to activate both: sudo zsh assistant/automation/scripts/setup-wake-schedule.sh
wake_schedule.caveat: Only reliable on AC power. On battery macOS may skip the wake.
